summary.key_theme: 受惠於 Tencent 投資加持與核心業務強勁成長，Kaspi.kz 展現出明確的上升動能。

bullish.title: Kaspi.Kz: Tencent Sees It, The Numbers Confirm It (Rating Upgrade) — Kaspi.kz (KSPI) gains momentum after Tencent stake; payments/marketplace growth strong and Turkey expansion looms.
bullish.reason: Tencent 的持股不僅提供戰略背書，更驗證了公司在支付與電商平台的成長潛力，加上市場對其擴張至土耳其的預期，推動了評級上調與股價動能。

neutral.title: Announcement of AGM Results — ALMATY, Kazakhstan , April 16, 2026 -- Joint Stock Company Kaspi.kz announces that the following resolutions were duly p
neutral.reason: 此為年度股東大會 (AGM) 的常規決議公告，屬於公司治理的例行程序，未包含對股價有顯著影響的重大變動。
